summary: Complete end-to-end testing of Pass-e-port travel information website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). All frontend features functional including color-coded world maps, navigation, filtering, and FOREX rates with sample data fallback.

ui_bugs.issue: Loading spinner occasionally persists longer than other pages

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Pass-e-port branding and navigation
All 5 navigation menu items present and functional
Hero section with correct content and CTA buttons
All 4 feature cards present on homepage
Seasons page displays color-coded world map (Peak=Red, Shoulder=Blue, Off=Orange)
Season legends display correctly with proper colors
20 countries data displayed on Seasons page with best months
Visa page displays color-coded map (Visa on Arrival=Red, E-visa=Blue, Visa Required=Orange)
Visa legends display correctly with visa type information
20 countries visa requirements displayed correctly
Forex page displays all 12 major currencies with INR base
Forex refresh button functionality working
Currency cards show proper flags, rates, and conversions
Apps page category filtering (All, Transport, Convenience, Food, Sightseeing) working
Apps page country dropdown filtering working
24 app recommendations displayed with proper categorization
Mobile navigation functionality working
Map tooltips working on hover
All backend APIs returning correct status codes and data structures
Apps filtering by country and category working via API
FOREX API fallback to sample data working correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (1 minor loading issue)
